examples: These pseudo-apologies are used by people who believe saying sorry shows weakness.
Chinese Mantis eyes have "pseudo pupils" that seem to follow you around, but the eyes do not really move.
Different from the circular time and the irreversible time, the spectacular time is a kind of toy bricks producing pseudo-events.
It may also be that the relationships under scrutiny are as pseudo as they seem.
The garish filigree of the gonzo director, Terry Gilliam, surrounds this fable of redemption with pseudo-originality.
